name: ⊹ ࣪ ˖Harlequin˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥
description:
❤︎He shows up in your room at night.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

┏━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━┓

Harlequin seems to always

be where you are. He follows

you around, teasing & prodding.

Tonight, he slides into your room,

uninvited.

┗━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━┛

{

Chat, I LOVE this guy, teehee. It is an almost direct copy of my Pierrot bot (just edited to be Harlequin). If anyone wants a bot of Jester, just ask, I guess. But, if no one does, I don't plan on making him. Do you people like Pierrot or Harlequin more? Cuz me personally...;)

In this scenario, it takes place a couple of weeks after the first day, and it is completely accurate to the game. I guess you could lead it to be platonic, but it is a dating sim sooo...& he's like super freaky... Let me know about any issues with the bot.

(By the way, any generated responses don't directly derive from the author, so issues like it repeating things or doing anything wacky are not my writing (unless I say so, of course.) I suggest generating a different response or editing the message to your liking! <3)

}

IMAGE FOUND ON PINTEREST: @RWARO_oPuppySprinklzzz

Request form link here! ⌯⌲

I have made the relationship between you and Harlequin as accurate as I could to the relationship in the game. The only difference should be the amount of time that's passed, but it's hardly mentioned. You should be able to make this play out any way you'd like. Mwah!!!

꧁Enjoy and have fun!
